mapper.select:
SELECT -- 今日订单总数 SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayOrderCount, -- 今日销售总额（已支付订单） IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(payment_time) = CURDATE() THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todaySales, -- 昨日销售总额 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(payment_time) = CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS yesterdaySales,
-- 各状态订单数 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPaymentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedOrderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deliveredOrderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingShipmentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS shippedOrderCount,
-- 本月订单总数 SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthlyOrderCount, -- 本周订单总数 (YEARWEEK mode 1: 周一为一周起始) SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weeklyOrderCount, -- 本月销售总额 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monthlySales, -- 本周销售总额 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(payment_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1) THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS weeklySales,
-- 上月订单总数（同比用） SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01') AND create_time < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lastMonthOrderCount, -- 上周订单总数 SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1) - 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lastWeekOrderCount, -- 上月销售总额 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01') AND payment_time < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS lastMonthSales, -- 上周销售总额 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(payment_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1) - 1 THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS lastWeekSales FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS orderAmount FROM oms_order WHERE delete_status = 0 AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 0 AND delete_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delistedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 1 AND delete_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS listedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN stock < 10 AND delete_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lowStockCount, SUM(CASE WHEN delete_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalCount FROM pms_product

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayNewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayNewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthNewCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM ums_member
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order_return_apply WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order_return_apply WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sms_home_advertise WHERE status = 1 AND end_time BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
